prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is S-301 Rigging configuration within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.3 Rigging & Machinery Moving. The observed field condition is: hook latch missing/tied back. The work is being assessed at the staged lifecycle state with source anchors ASME B30, OSHA 1926.251.
title: T2 S-301 Tool & material selection
